An '''Adegan lens''' was a type of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Focusing lens/Legends|focusing lens]] that was in use<ref name="kotor2" /> during the [[Dark Wars]],<ref name="kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> a string of conflicts occurring after the [[Jedi Civil War]], which were fought between the [[Sith Triumvirate|leftovers]] of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. The lens was constructed from [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] for use in a lightsaber, an energy-bladed melee weapon, which was used by members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], as well as by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Although Adegan crystals were one of several crystals suitable for focusing lens construction, they were more commonly used as [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|focusing crystals]] in lightsabers. When added inside of a [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|lightsaber hilt]], the Adegan lens caused the lightsaber to be much more powerful.<ref name="kotor2" /> During the Dark Wars,<ref name="kotorcg" /> the lens was somewhat hard to find and could cost as much as 7600 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] when it was found for sale.<ref name="kotor2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Adegan lens first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|video game]] produced by [[Obsidian Entertainment]]. In ''The Sith Lords'', it was a lens upgrade for lightsabers that was placed in randomly determined places throughout the game, and it could also be constructed at a workbench by characters with a high enough Awareness skill. The Adegan lens provided the lightsaber it was added to with a large energy damage bonus.<ref name="kotor2" /> The lens also had an entry in the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]] by [[Prima Games]].<ref name="kotor2sg">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref>
